subject: End-to-end validation of combined notebook against original 7-script pipeline
description: Run pre_processing_notebook_csd.py.ipynb top-to-bottom (Steps 0-6 + EDA cells, all in one execution) via Jupyter (not nbconvert, so Brian can watch/verify) and compare every intermediate in-memory dataframe shape/columns/key-stat against the equivalent original .py script's output parquet at each stage: Step 1 (df vs step_1_aggregate_bymonth.parquet), Step 2 (df_calendar vs step_2 output), Step 3 (df_filtered vs step_3 output, expect 58 brands), Step 4 (df_features vs step_4 output, confirm no lag_1 leakage), Step 5 (df_split vs step_5 output, split sizes), Step 6 (final written csd_feature_matrix.parquet vs the canonical orchestrator-produced one, expect 58 brands / 2,552 rows). Document any discrepancy immediately in progress.md rather than silently reconciling it. This is an integration-level test spanning the whole notebook, not a per-step unit check (those already happened in Tasks 1-7) -- the goal here is confirming the full combined flow produces identical final output to the current production orchestrator (`python preprocessing_csd.py --grain bymonth`) before treating the notebook as a viable replacement/supplement.
activeForm: Validating combined notebook end-to-end against original pipeline
